name: hire-ai
description: Website tuyển dụng tích hợp chatbot AI tư vấn và định hướng nghề nghiệp (React, Tailwind, Node/Express, MySQL)

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix client install && npm --prefix server install
scripts.format:all: npm run format:client && npm run format:server
scripts.format:check:all: npm run format:check:client && npm run format:check:server
scripts.lint:all: npm run lint:client && npm run lint:server
scripts.lint:check:all: npm run lint:check:client && npm run lint:check:server
scripts.test:all: npm --prefix client run test && npm --prefix server test -- --runInBand
scripts.verify:all: npm run format:check:all && npm run lint:check:all && npm run test:all && npm run build
